title: agropyron orientale subsp. distans
intro: Agropyron orientale subsp. distans, also known as Daurian foxtail, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Daurian foxtail include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce blood sugar levels. Daurian foxtail can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
